title: agrostis lenis
intro: Agrostis lenis, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant contains flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Agrostis lenis can be prepared as an infusion or tea, or used in tincture form, and is often used to soothe coughs and promote relaxation.
